items.title: Is the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust the Smartest Investment You Can Make Today?
items.author: Adria Cimino
items.description: The article discusses investing in the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (SPY) during a market downturn caused by uncertainty over President Trump's tariffs. It argues that quality stocks and ETFs may be trading at bargain prices, and the S&P 500 has historically recovered and delivered strong returns over the long term.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article recommends investing in the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust as a smart move, as it provides exposure to the resilient S&P 500 index, which has historically recovered and delivered strong returns over the long term, even during market downturns.
The article mentions that Coca-Cola's stock advanced over the past month, even as the overall market declined, suggesting it may be a good diversification option.
The article mentions that AbbVie's stock advanced over the past month, even as the overall market declined, suggesting it may be a good diversification option.
